questions.question: What does swapping refer to in the context of operating systems?
options: The process of exchanging data between two locations
questions.explanation: The process of exchanging data between two locations

questions.question: Which type of swapping involves the actual swapping of data between memory and disk?
What is the primary purpose of swap space in an operating system?
options: To provide a buffer for disk I/O operations
To improve system performance by caching frequently used data
To provide a temporary storage area for data
To enable swapping of data between memory and disk
questions.explanation: To enable swapping of data between memory and disk

questions.question: What is the term for the amount of data that can be swapped in and out of main memory at any given time?
Which of the following is NOT a type of swapping?
